title: Kubernetes In-Place Pod Resize: Vertical Scaling Without Downtime
description: A practical deep dive into Kubernetes In-Place Pod Resize, now GA in v1.35. Covers how mutable resource requests work, resize policies, pod conditions, VPA integration with InPlaceOrRecreate mode, and real-world patterns for resizing running pods without restarts.

title: Kargo Deep Dive: Verification, Soak Times, and Reusable Promotion Tasks
description: A practical guide to building production-ready Kargo promotion pipelines. Covers post-promotion verification with AnalysisTemplates, soak time requirements for safe progressive delivery, and PromotionTasks for DRY promotion workflows across environments.

title: Migrating from NGINX Ingress to Envoy Gateway: A Practical Guide
description: A detailed walkthrough of migrating 16+ services from NGINX Ingress Controller to Envoy Gateway using the Kubernetes Gateway API. Covers HTTPRoute patterns, SecurityPolicy, BackendTrafficPolicy, TLS backends, custom error pages, and the real-world problems you will hit along the way.

title: Argo CD Image Updater: Automating Container Image Deployments in GitOps
description: A deep dive into Argo CD Image Updater, the tool that automatically detects new container image versions and updates your Argo CD applications. Learn how to configure update strategies, write changes back to Git, authenticate with private registries, and close the gap between CI and CD in your GitOps pipeline.

title: Argo CD Notifications: Alerting on Your GitOps Pipeline
description: A deep dive into Argo CD Notifications, the built-in system for sending alerts when your applications sync, fail, or change health status. Learn how to configure triggers, templates, and services like Slack, webhooks, and PagerDuty to keep your team informed without watching dashboards.

title: Secrets Management for GitOps: A Deep Dive into External Secrets Operator
description: A practical guide to managing secrets in GitOps workflows using External Secrets Operator. Learn how SecretStores, ExternalSecrets, and PushSecrets bridge the gap between external secret providers and Kubernetes, and how ESO integrates with Argo CD for secure, automated secret delivery.

title: Argo Rollouts: Progressive Delivery for Kubernetes
description: A deep dive into Argo Rollouts, the Kubernetes-native progressive delivery controller. Learn how to implement canary deployments, blue-green releases, and automated analysis to safely roll out changes with minimal risk.

title: What's New in Argo CD 3.3: PreDelete Hooks, Source Hydrator Upgrades, and Shallow Cloning
description: A deep dive into Argo CD 3.3's most impactful features, including PreDelete hooks for safe application teardown, inline parameters for the Source Hydrator, shallow Git cloning for faster syncs, and native KEDA integration.

title: Argo CD ApplicationSets: Managing Applications at Scale
description: A deep dive into Argo CD ApplicationSets, the powerful controller that automates Application generation across clusters and environments. Learn how generators, templating, and progressive sync help you manage hundreds of applications from a single manifest.

title: Introduction to Kargo: GitOps Promotion Pipelines for Kubernetes
description: An introduction to Kargo, the Kubernetes-native tool that brings structured promotion pipelines to GitOps workflows. Learn how Warehouses, Freight, and Stages work together to move your applications safely from dev to production.

title: Getting Started with Argo CD: A Practical Guide to GitOps on Kubernetes
description: A hands-on introduction to Argo CD, the declarative GitOps continuous delivery tool for Kubernetes. Learn how to install it, deploy your first application, and adopt GitOps best practices.
